title.zh: 微信小程序逆向 IV - 字节码虚拟机、内存转储与加固对抗
title.en: WeChat MiniApp Reverse IV - Bytecode VM, Memory Dump, and Hardening Countermeasures

description.zh: 当小程序采用字节码保护、多层包装壳后，常规静态解包完全失效，需转向内存级动态逆向分析。
description.en: When MiniApps use bytecode protection and multi-layer wrappers, static unpacking fails, requiring memory-level dynamic reverse engineering.

content.zh:
主流防护类型与绕过成功率：
- V8/QuickJS 字节码保护：绕过率 70-85%
- 多层包装壳与自校验：绕过率 80-90%
- 行为与环境指纹检测：绕过率 75-95%
content.en:
Main protection types and bypass rates:
- V8/QuickJS bytecode protection: 70-85% bypass rate
- Multi-layer wrapper with self-check: 80-90% bypass rate
- Behavior and environment fingerprint: 75-95% bypass rate

annotation.zh: 核心原则：业务明文最终都会在内存中完成组装
annotation.en: Core principle: business plaintext will eventually be assembled in memory

content.zh:
推荐技术栈选择：
- Frida Memory.scan：特征值搜索内存明文
- r0capture：自动化提取网络明文流量
- Frida Hook fetch/XMLHttpRequest：拦截请求体
- bytenode/v8-decompile：尝试字节码还原
content.en:
Recommended tech stack:
- Frida Memory.scan: search memory plaintext by signature
- r0capture: automated network plaintext extraction
- Frida Hook fetch/XMLHttpRequest: intercept request body
- bytenode/v8-decompile: attempt bytecode restoration

annotation.zh: Ghidra/IDA Pro 用于分析 Native 层壳逻辑
annotation.en: Ghidra/IDA Pro for analyzing Native layer wrapper logic

content.zh:
内存分析策略：
1. Memory.scanSync 搜索业务特征值（如手机号、订单号）
2. Hook 网络请求发送入口 wx.request、XMLHttpRequest.send
3. 内存转储 TypedArray 与 ArrayBuffer 缓冲区
content.en:
Memory analysis strategies:
1. Memory.scanSync to search for business signatures (phone, order ID)
2. Hook network request entry points wx.request, XMLHttpRequest.send
3. Memory dump TypedArray and ArrayBuffer buffers

annotation.zh: 定位到特征值地址后，读取前后 1000 字节提取完整明文
annotation.en: After locating signature address, read 1000 bytes before/after to extract complete plaintext

content.zh:
实战案例：绕过某支付小程序字节码保护
1. 静态分析：app-service.js 为加密字节码
2. 动态附加：Frida 附加微信进程
3. 内存扫描：搜索订单号特征值
4. 密钥定位：Hook Cipher.doFinal 提取 AES 密钥
5. 流量解密：完成后续业务流量解密
content.en:
Case study: bypass bytecode protection of payment MiniApp
1. Static analysis: app-service.js is encrypted bytecode
2. Dynamic attach: Frida attach to WeChat process
3. Memory scan: search for order ID signature
4. Key location: Hook Cipher.doFinal to extract AES key
5. Traffic decryption: complete subsequent traffic decryption

annotation.zh: 进阶优化：结合 r0capture、frida-trace 实现自动化明文提取
annotation.en: Advanced: combine r0capture, frida-trace for automated plaintext extraction

content.zh:
字节码 VM 场景下的加密请求流程：
JavaScript字节码 → VM解释执行 → 构造业务明文 → AES.encrypt() → ArrayBuffer → HTTPS发送
content.en:
Encrypted request flow under bytecode VM:
JavaScript bytecode → VM interpretation → Build business plaintext → AES.encrypt() → ArrayBuffer → HTTPS send

annotation.zh: VM 无法阻止明文在运行时出现在进程内存中
annotation.en: VM cannot prevent plaintext from appearing in process memory at runtime

content.zh:
突破方案：
方案一：Hook org.json.JSONObject.toString() 捕获明文汇聚点
方案二：Memory.scan 扫描 libwechat.so 模块提取明文
content.en:
Bypass solutions:
Option 1: Hook org.json.JSONObject.toString() to capture plaintext aggregation
Option 2: Memory.scan libwechat.so module to extract plaintext

annotation.zh: 建议扩大扫描范围至整个进程可读写内存区域
annotation.en: Recommend extending scan range to entire process read-write memory

content.zh:
技术边界总结：
- HTTPS 解决网络传输层窃听风险
- 静态加密解决源码静态泄露风险
- 字节码 VM 解决批量自动化静态逆向风险
- 内存级动态分析可突破绝大多数静态防护
content.en:
Technical boundary summary:
- HTTPS: network layer eavesdropping risk
- Static encryption: source code leak risk
- Bytecode VM: automated static reverse risk
- Memory-level dynamic analysis: bypass most static protections

annotation.zh: 防护建议：字节码 VM + Native 加固 + 行为指纹 + 服务端实时校验
annotation.en: Protection: bytecode VM + Native hardening + behavior fingerprint + server-side real-time validation
